stem: A scatterplot shows a line of best fit passing through the points (2, 3) and (8, 8). According to the line of best fit, what is the value of y when x = 6 (rounded to the nearest whole number)?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Slope = (8 − 3)/(8 − 2) = 5/6 ≈ 0.833. Line: y − 3 = (5/6)(x − 2). At x = 6: y = 3 + (5/6)(4) = 3 + 20/6 ≈ 6.33, which rounds to 6.

Choices B, C, and D arise from common arithmetic errors.
